statements.statement:
MATCH (u:User {id: 5})
MATCH (u)-[:HAS_SKILL]->(s:Skill)<-[:REQUIRES_SKILL]-(j:Job)
WHERE NOT j.title CONTAINS '국비'
AND NOT j.title CONTAINS '교육과정'
AND NOT j.title CONTAINS '부트캠프'
AND NOT j.title CONTAINS '수강생'
AND NOT j.title CONTAINS '훈련생'
WITH DISTINCT j, u
ORDER BY j.deadline ASC
LIMIT 3000
OPTIONAL MATCH (u)-[:HAS_SKILL]->(s:Skill)<-[:REQUIRES_SKILL]-(j)
WITH j, u, count(s) AS graphScore
WITH j, u, graphScore,
CASE
WHEN u.embedding IS NULL OR j.embedding IS NULL THEN 0.0
ELSE REDUCE(dot = 0.0, i IN range(0, size(u.embedding)-1) | dot + u.embedding[i] * j.embedding[i])
END AS rawVScore
RETURN count(j.id)
